name: Mermaid Sequence — API Authentication Flow
input: Create a sequence diagram showing API authentication: Client sends credentials to Auth Server, Auth Server validates with Database, Database returns user data, Auth Server generates JWT token, Auth Server sends token to Client, Client uses token to access Resource Server, Resource Server validates token with Auth Server, Resource Server returns protected data to Client.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Multi-participant sequence diagram with labeled messages between actors.

data.syntax:
sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant AS as Auth Server
    participant DB as Database
    participant RS as Resource Server
    C->>AS: Send credentials
    AS->>DB: Validate user
    DB-->>AS: User data
    AS->>AS: Generate JWT
    AS-->>C: Return token
    C->>RS: Request with token
    RS->>AS: Validate token
    AS-->>RS: Token valid
    RS-->>C: Protected data
data.caption: API authentication flow with JWT token exchange
